meta.content: Cours, exercices, devoirs, sujets BAC/BEM et corriges pour les eleves algeriens.
meta.name: description

body.script:
// var PAGE_MARKUP = { home: `Aller au contenu
🇩🇿 SCHOOL-BIBLIO

0
0
0

`, library: `Aller au contenu

`, assistant: `Aller au contenu

Conversations

Prompts sauvegardés
`, admin: `Aller au contenu

Source

📥 Export Manifest JSON

Génère un manifest compatible avec fp-smart / dzexams. Télécharge le fichier ou copie-le dans le presse-papier pour un upload cloud.

Importer / Sauvegardes

Importe un fichier db.json ou restaure une sauvegarde locale.

☁️ Synchronisation GitHub

Push automatique de db.json vers GitHub pour synchroniser entre PC.

Toutes les
À
Une sauvegarde automatique est créée dans la liste ci-dessus selon l'horaire choisi.

📥 Import depuis un manifeste

Importe un fichier manifeste JSON (dzexams, etc.) pour pré-remplir le formulaire d'ajout de document.

` }; function detectPage() { var path = window.location.pathname; if (path.indexOf('library') !== -1) return 'library'; if (path.indexOf('assistant') !== -1) return 'assistant'; if (path.indexOf('admin') !== -1) return 'admin'; return 'home'; } /* ---- Import manifest helpers ---- */ const LEVEL_CODE_MAP = { '0ap':'presco','1ap':'p1','2ap':'p2','3ap':'p3','4ap':'p4','5ap':'p5', '1am':'m1','2am':'m2','3am':'m3','4am':'m4', '1as':'s1','2as':'s2','3as':'s3' }; const TYPE_MAP = {'Cours':'cours','Exercices':'exercices','Devoir':'devoir', 'Composition':'composition','Examens':'examens','Corrigés':'corriges', 'Corrige':'corriges','Résumés':'resumes','Résumé':'resumes', 'Document':'devoir','BAC':'bac-bem','BEM':'bac-bem'}; const STREAM_MAP = {'Tronc commun':'general','Sciences Expérimentales':'sciences', 'Mathématiques':'math','Technique Mathématique':'techno', 'Gestion et Économie':'gestion','Lettres et Philosophie':'lettres', 'Langues Étrangères':'langues'}; function guessLevel(code) { return LEVEL_CODE_MAP[code] || code || LEVEL_CODE_MAP['0ap']; } function guessSubject(matiere) { if (!matiere) return 'math'; const fr = (matiere.split('/')[0] || matiere).trim().toLowerCase(); const subjects = APP.db.subjects || window.INRY_DB.subjects || []; for (const s of subjects) { const sn = (localized(s.name) || '').toLowerCase(); if (sn === fr || sn.startsWith(fr) || fr.startsWith(sn)) return s.id; } for (const s of subjects) { const sf = (s.name.fr || '').toLowerCase(); if (sf === fr || sf.startsWith(fr) || fr.startsWith(sf)) return s.id; } return 'math'; } function guessType(typeLabel) { if (!typeLabel) return 'devoir'; const t = typeLabel.trim(); return TYPE_MAP[t] || TYPE_MAP['Document']; } function guessStream(streamLabel) { if (!streamLabel || streamLabel === 'null') return ''; return STREAM_MAP[streamLabel.trim()] || streamLabel || ''; } function guessTrimestre(tr) { if (!tr || tr === 'null') return ''; const m = {1:'t1',2:'t2',3:'t3','01':'t1','02':'t2','03':'t3','1er':'t1','2ème':'t2','3ème':'t3'}; return m[String(tr).trim()] || ''; } function extractDriveId(url) { const m = url && url.match(/[-\w]{25,}(?=[/?]|$)/); return m ? m[0] : null; } function toPreviewUrl(url) { const id = extractDriveId(url); return id ? `https://drive.google.com/file/d/${id}/preview` : url; } function toDownloadUrl(url) { const id = extractDriveId(url); return id ? `https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=${id}` : url; } function guessHost(url) { if (!url) return 'drive'; return url.includes('mega.nz') ? 'mega' : 'drive'; } function getFieldValue(item, aliases) { if (!item || !aliases) return ''; for (const alias of aliases) { let val; if (alias.includes('.')) { val = alias.split('.').reduce((o, k) => (o != null ? o[k] : undefined), item); } else { val = item[alias]; } if (val != null && val !== '') return val; } return ''; } var IMPORT_ALIASES = { 'title.ar': ['titre', 'title.ar', 'title', 'العنوان'], 'title.fr': ['title.fr', 'titreFr', 'titre_fr'], 'title.en': ['title.en', 'titreEn', 'titre_en'], level: ['niveau', 'level', 'grade', 'المستوى', 'classe'], stream: ['filiere', 'stream', 'branch', 'الشعبة'], subject: ['matiere', 'subject', 'subjectName', 'المادة'], type: ['type_doc_label', 'type', 'type_doc', 'docType', 'النوع'], year: ['annee', 'year', 'année', 'السنة'], trimestre: ['trimestre', 'trimester', 'term', 'الفصل'], wilaya: ['wilaya', 'codeWilaya', 'ولاية'], size: ['tailleFichier', 'taille_octets', 'tailleOctets', 'size', 'fileSize', 'filesize', 'الحجم'], pages: ['pages', 'nbrPages', 'pageCount', 'عدد الصفحات'], previewUrl: ['urlCloud', 'url_cloud', 'previewUrl', 'cloudUrl', 'preview'], downloadUrl: ['urlPartage', 'url_partage', 'downloadUrl', 'shareUrl', 'downloadLink'], host: ['provider', 'site', 'host', 'website', 'platform'], source: ['source', 'siteSource', 'origin'], urlSource: ['urlSource', 'url_source', 'sourceUrl'], urlPdf: ['urlPdf', 'url_pdf', 'pdfUrl'], hasSolution: ['hasSolution', 'corrige', 'solution', 'avecCorrection', 'مع التصحيح'] }; function normalizeImportItem(item) { const size = getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.size); const sizeNum = parseInt(size, 10); const sizeStr = !isNaN(sizeNum) && sizeNum > 0 ? (sizeNum >= 1048576 ? (sizeNum / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : Math.round(sizeNum / 1024) + ' KB') : String(size || ''); const hasSolution = getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.hasSolution); return { title: { ar: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES['title.ar']), fr: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES['title.fr']), en: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES['title.en']) }, level: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.level), stream: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.stream) || null, subject: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.subject), type: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.type), year: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.year), trimestre: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.trimestre) || null, wilaya: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.wilaya) || '', size: sizeStr, pages: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.pages) || '', previewUrl: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.previewUrl), downloadUrl: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.downloadUrl), host: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.host) || 'dzexams', source: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.source) || '', urlSource: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.urlSource) || '', urlPdf: getFieldValue(item, IMPORT_ALIASES.urlPdf) || '', tags: hasSolution ? ['solution'] : [] }; } function detectProviderFromUrl(url) { if (!url) return null; if (url.includes('drive.google.com') || url.includes('googledrive')) return 'google'; if (url.includes('mega.nz')) return 'mega'; if (url.includes('onedrive')) return 'onedrive'; if (url.includes('dropbox')) return 'dropbox'; return null; } function migrateHostFromUrl() { const pending = getPendingDocs(); const localDocs = getLocalDocs(); let updated = 0; pending.forEach(d => { const provider = detectProviderFromUrl(d.previewUrl) || detectProviderFromUrl(d.downloadUrl); if (provider && d.host !== provider) { d.host = provider; updated++; } }); savePendingDocs(pending); localDocs.forEach(d => { const provider = detectProviderFromUrl(d.previewUrl) || detectProviderFromUrl(d.downloadUrl); if (provider && d.host !== provider) { d.host = provider; updated++; } }); saveLocalDocs(localDocs); try { var custom = localStorage.getItem('inry_custom_db'); if (custom) { var data = JSON.parse(custom); if (data.documents) { data.documents.forEach(d => { const provider = detectProviderFromUrl(d.previewUrl) || detectProviderFromUrl(d.downloadUrl); if (provider && d.host !== provider) { d.host = provider; updated++; } }); localStorage.setItem('inry_custom_db', JSON.stringify(data)); } } } catch(e) {} applyLocalDocOverrides(); renderAdminDocTable(); showToast(updated + ' document(s) mis à jour (host → provider)'); } async function translateFromAr(text, targetLang) { if (!text.trim()) return ''; try { const url = `https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q=${encodeURIComponent(text.slice(0,500))}&langpair=ar|${targetLang}`; const res = await fetch(url); const data = await res.json(); return data.responseData?.translatedText || text; } catch { return text; } } function parseManifestDoc(d) { const sizeStr = d.tailleFichier ? formatFileSize(Number(d.tailleFichier)) : (d.size || '—'); const arTitle = (d.titre || d.nomFichier || '').replace(/[\u{1F600}-\u{1F64F}\u{1F300}-\u{1F5FF}\u{1F680}-\u{1F6FF}\u{1F1E0}-\u{1F1FF}\u{2702}-\u{27B0}\u{24C2}-\u{1F251}\u{1F900}-\u{1F9FF}\u{200D}\u{FE0F}❌📅]/gu,'').trim(); const rawPreview = getFieldValue(d, IMPORT_ALIASES.previewUrl); const rawDownload = getFieldValue(d, IMPORT_ALIASES.downloadUrl); const previewUrl = toPreviewUrl(rawPreview || rawDownload); const downloadUrl = toDownloadUrl(rawDownload || rawPreview); return { id: null, title: { fr: '', ar: arTitle.replace(/\.pdf$/i,'').trim(), en: '' }, level: guessLevel(d.niveau || d.levelCode), stream: guessStream(d.filiere || ''), subject: guessSubject(d.matiere || d.subject || ''), type: guessType(d.type), year: parseInt(d.annee || d.year,10) || new Date().getFullYear(), trimestre: guessTrimestre(d.trimestre), wilaya: d.wilaya || null, description: { fr: d.description?.fr || '', ar: d.description?.ar || '', en: d.description?.en || '' }, fileType: 'pdf', pages: parseInt(d.pages,10) || 1, size: sizeStr, previewUrl: previewUrl, downloadUrl: downloadUrl, source: getFieldValue(d, IMPORT_ALIASES.source) || '', urlSource: getFieldValue(d, IMPORT_ALIASES.urlSource) || '', urlPdf: getFieldValue(d, IMPORT_ALIASES.urlPdf) || '', host: guessHost(previewUrl || downloadUrl), downloads: 0, rating: 0, tags: d.tags || [] }; } function renderManifestPreview(parsedDocs, rawDocs) { const container = document.getElementById('import-manifest-preview'); if (!container || !parsedDocs.length) return; let html = '
'; html += '

' + parsedDocs.length + ' document(s) trouvé(s)

'; html += ''; html += '
'; html += '
'; html += '' + '' + ''; parsedDocs.forEach((doc, i) => { html += '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; }); html += '
Titre (AR)NiveauMatièreTypeTailleAction
' + escapeHTML(doc.title.ar.slice(0,60)) + '' + escapeHTML(doc.level) + '' + escapeHTML(doc.subject) + '' + escapeHTML(doc.type) + '' + escapeHTML(doc.size) + '
'; html += '

Cliquez sur "Pré-remplir" pour un document, ou "Tout ajouter en une fois" pour tous les importer directement.

'; container.innerHTML = html; container.style.display = 'block'; container.querySelectorAll('.prefill-from-import-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { const idx = parseInt(btn.dataset.index, 10); prefillFormFromImport(parsedDocs[idx], rawDocs[idx]); }); }); const addAllBtn = document.getElementById('import-add-all-btn'); if (addAllBtn) { addAllBtn.addEventListener('click', () => batchAddAll(parsedDocs, rawDocs)); } } async function prefillFormFromImport(doc, raw) { const setVal = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = val; }; const [frTitle, enTitle] = await Promise.all([ doc.title.fr || translateFromAr(doc.title.ar, 'fr'), doc.title.en || translateFromAr(doc.title.ar, 'en') ]); setVal('doc-form-title-fr', frTitle); setVal('doc-form-title-ar', doc.title.ar); setVal('doc-form-title-en', enTitle); setVal('doc-form-desc-fr', frTitle); setVal('doc-form-desc-ar', doc.title.ar); setVal('doc-form-desc-en', enTitle); setVal('doc-form-level', doc.level); setVal('doc-form-stream', doc.stream); setVal('doc-form-subject', doc.subject); setVal('doc-form-type', doc.type); setVal('doc-form-year', doc.year); setVal('doc-form-trimestre', doc.trimestre); setVal('doc-form-wilaya', doc.wilaya || ''); setVal('doc-form-pages', doc.pages > 1 ? doc.pages : ''); setVal('doc-form-size', doc.size); setVal('doc-form-host', doc.host); setVal('doc-form-preview-url', doc.previewUrl); setVal('doc-form-download-url', doc.downloadUrl); setVal('doc-form-source', doc.source || ''); setVal('doc-form-url-source', doc.urlSource || ''); setVal('doc-form-url-pdf', doc.urlPdf || ''); document.querySelector('.admin-sub-tab[data-subtab="docs-add"]').click(); } function getPendingDocs() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(PENDING_DOCS_KEY) || '[]'); } catch { return []; } } function savePendingDocs(docs) { localStorage.setItem(PENDING_DOCS_KEY, JSON.stringify(docs)); } function approvePendingDoc(docId) { const pending = getPendingDocs(); const idx = pending.findIndex(d => d.id === docId); if (idx === -1) return; const [doc] = pending.splice(idx, 1); savePendingDocs(pending); upsertLocalDoc(doc); applyLocalDocOverrides(); renderAdminDocTable(); } function rejectPendingDoc(docId) { const pending = getPendingDocs(); const filtered = pending.filter(d => d.id !== docId); savePendingDocs(filtered); renderAdminDocTable(); } function approveAllPending() { const pending = getPendingDocs(); if (!pending.length) return; pending.forEach(d => upsertLocalDoc(d)); savePendingDocs([]); applyLocalDocOverrides(); renderAdminDocTable(); showToast(pending.length + ' document(s) validé(s)'); } async function batchAddAll(parsedDocs, rawDocs) { let idCounter = Math.max(0, ...APP.db.documents.map(d => parseInt((d.id||'').replace('doc-',''),10)).filter(n=>!isNaN(n)), ...getPendingDocs().map(d => parseInt((d.id||'').replace('doc-',''),10)).filter(n=>!isNaN(n))); const pending = getPendingDocs(); let count = 0; for (let i = 0; i < parsedDocs.length; i++) { const d = parsedDocs[i]; const [frTitle, enTitle] = await Promise.all([ d.title.fr || translateFromAr(d.title.ar, 'fr'), d.title.en || translateFromAr(d.title.ar, 'en') ]); idCounter++; const doc = { id: 'doc-' + String(idCounter).padStart(4, '0'), title: { fr: frTitle, ar: d.title.ar, en: enTitle }, level: d.level, stream: d.stream || null, subject: d.subject, type: d.type, year: d.year, trimestre: d.trimestre || null, wilaya: d.wilaya, description: { fr: frTitle, ar: d.title.ar, en: enTitle }, fileType: 'pdf', pages: d.pages, size: d.size, previewUrl: d.previewUrl, downloadUrl: d.downloadUrl, host: d.host, source: d.source || '', urlSource: d.urlSource || '', urlPdf: d.urlPdf || '', downloads: 0, rating: 0, tags: [] }; pending.push(doc); count++; } savePendingDocs(pending); renderAdminDocTable(); showToast(count + ' document(s) importé(s) — en attente de validation dans la liste 📋'); } function wireImportManifest() { const fileInput = document.getElementById('import-manifest-file'); const parseBtn = document.getElementById('import-manifest-parse-btn'); if (!fileInput || !parseBtn) { console.warn('[Import] éléments introuvables'); return; } console.log('[Import] module initialisé'); const doParse = () => { const file = fileInput.files && fileInput.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { try { const raw = JSON.parse(e.target.result); const items = raw.items || raw.documents || raw.fichiers || raw.data || (Array.isArray(raw) ? raw : [raw]); if (!items.length) throw new Error('Aucun document trouvé'); const normalized = items.map(normalizeImportItem); renderManifestPreview(normalized, items); } catch (err) { alert('Erreur de lecture du manifeste : ' + err.message); } }; reader.readAsText(file); }; parseBtn.addEventListener('click', doParse); fileInput.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') doParse(); }); const migrateBtn = document.getElementById('migrate-host-btn'); if (migrateBtn) migrateBtn.addEventListener('click', migrateHostFromUrl); } function runPageScript(page) { if (page === 'home') { (function() { async function init() { await loadData(); applyLocalDocOverrides(); applyLangToDocument(); render(); } function render() { document.title = t('siteName') + ' — ' + t('tagline'); document.getElementById('header-root').innerHTML = renderHeader('home'); document.getElementById('footer-root').innerHTML = renderFooter(); document.getElementById('modal-root').innerHTML = renderDocModal(); translateStaticDOM(); document.getElementById('theme-toggle').innerHTML = icon(APP.theme === 'light' ? 'moon' : 'sun'); // stats document.getElementById('stat-docs').textContent = APP.db.documents.length + '+'; document.getElementById('stat-subjects').textContent = APP.db.subjects.length; document.getElementById('stat-levels').textContent = 4; document.getElementById('hero-stamp').textContent = '🇩🇿 ' + t('siteName'); // levels grid — 4 categories: Préscolaire, Primaire, Moyen, Lycée const levelsGrid = document.getElementById('levels-grid'); const levelCategories = [ { id: 'prescolaire', name: { fr: 'Préscolaire', ar: 'تحضيري', en: 'Preschool' }, levelIds: ['presco'] }, { id: 'primaire', name: { fr: 'Primaire', ar: 'ابتدائي', en: 'Primary' }, levelIds: ['p1','p2','p3','p4','p5'] }, { id: 'moyen', name: { fr: 'Moyen', ar: 'متوسط', en: 'Middle School' }, levelIds: ['m1','m2','m3','m4'] }, { id: 'lycee', name: { fr: 'Lycée', ar: 'ثانوي', en: 'High School' }, levelIds: ['s1','s2','s3'] } ]; const hiddenIds = new Set(getHiddenIds()); levelsGrid.innerHTML = levelCategories.map(cat => { const count = APP.db.documents.filter(d => cat.levelIds.includes(d.level) && !hiddenIds.has(d.id)).length; const years = APP.db.levels.flatMap(g => g.years).filter(y => cat.levelIds.includes(y.id)); return `
${icon('book')}
${localized(cat.name)}
${count} ${t('filters.results')}
${icon('chevronDown')}
${years.map(year => { const yCount = APP.db.documents.filter(d => d.level === year.id && !hiddenIds.has(d.id)).length; return `
${icon('fileText')}
${localized(year.name)}
${yCount} ${t('filters.results')}
 `; }).join('')}
`; }).join(''); // subjects grid const subjectsGrid = document.getElementById('subjects-grid'); subjectsGrid.innerHTML = APP.db.subjects.map(sub => { const count = APP.db.documents.filter(d => d.subject === sub.id && !hiddenIds.has(d.id)).length; return `
${icon(sub.icon)}
${localized(sub.name)}
${count} ${t('filters.results')}
 `; }).join(''); // featured BAC/BEM docs (top by downloads) const featured = APP.db.documents .filter(d => d.type === 'bac-bem' && !hiddenIds.has(d.id)) .sort((a, b) => b.downloads - a.downloads) .slice(0, 6); renderDocGrid('featured-grid', featured); wireLayoutEvents(); document.getElementById('hero-search-form').addEventListener('submit', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const q = document.getElementById('hero-search-input').value.trim(); window.location.href = 'library.html' + (q ? '?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q) : ''); }); } function toggleLevelCategory(catId) { const subgrid = document.getElementById('subgrid-' + catId); if (!subgrid) return; const isHidden = subgrid.style.display === 'none' || !subgrid.style.display; subgrid.style.display = isHidden ? 'grid' : 'none'; const tile = document.querySelector(`[data-cat="${catId}"]`); if (tile) tile.classList.toggle('expanded', isHidden); } window.toggleLevelCategory = toggleLevelCategory; function onLangChange() { render(); } window.onLangChange = onLangChange; init(); })(); } else if (page === 'library') { (function() { function applyURLParamsToFilters() { const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); ['level', 'levelGroup', 'stream', 'subject', 'type', 'trimestre', 'year'].forEach(key => { if (params.has(key)) APP.filters[key] = params.get(key); }); if (params.has('q')) APP.filters.search = params.get('q'); } async function init() { await loadData(); applyLangToDocument(); applyLocalDocOverrides(); applyURLParamsToFilters(); render(); } function renderLibrary() { const docs = getFilteredDocs(); renderDocGrid('library-grid', docs); document.getElementById('filters-count').textContent = docs.length + ' ' + t('filters.results'); } function render() { document.title = t('nav.library') + ' — ' + t('siteName'); document.getElementById('header-root').innerHTML = renderHeader('library'); document.getElementById('footer-root').innerHTML = renderFooter(); document.getElementById('modal-root').innerHTML = renderDocModal(); translateStaticDOM(); document.getElementById('theme-toggle').innerHTML = icon(APP.theme === 'light' ? 'moon' : 'sun'); populateFilterBar(); wireFilterBar(renderLibrary); wireLayoutEvents(); renderLibrary(); document.getElementById('search-form').addEventListener('submit', (e) => e.preventDefault()); } function onLangChange() { render(); } window.onLangChange = onLangChange; init(); })(); } else if (page === 'assistant') { (function() { window.onerror = function(msg, url, line) { console.error('[FATAL]', msg, url, line); var d = document.createElement('div'); d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:red;color:#fff;padding:8px;z-index:9999;font-size:14px;'; d.textContent = 'JS Error: ' + msg + ' (line ' + line + ')'; document.body.prepend(d); }; async function init() { try { await loadData(); applyLangToDocument(); render(); } catch(e) { console.error('[init]', e); var d = document.createElement('div'); d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:red;color:#fff;padding:8px;z-index:9999;font-size:14px;'; d.textContent = 'Init Error: ' + e.message; document.body.prepend(d); } } function render() { try { document.title = t('assistant.title') + ' — ' + t('siteName'); document.getElementById('header-root').innerHTML = renderHeader('assistant'); translateStaticDOM(); document.getElementById('theme-toggle').innerHTML = icon(APP.theme === 'light' ? 'moon' : 'sun'); document.getElementById('chat-clear-btn').innerHTML = icon('trash') + ' ' + t('assistant.clear') + ''; var imgBtn = document.getElementById('chat-img-btn'); var canvasBtn = document.getElementById('chat-canvas-btn'); if (imgBtn) imgBtn.innerHTML = icon('image') + ' Image'; if (canvasBtn) canvasBtn.innerHTML = icon('feather') + ' Canvas'; document.getElementById('attach-icon').innerHTML = icon('paperclip'); document.querySelector('.chat-empty > div').innerHTML = icon('robot'); document.querySelector('button[type="submit"] .btn-send-icon').innerHTML = icon('send'); } catch(e) { console.error('[render 1/2]', e); } try { const suggestions = { ar: ['اشرح لي نظرية طالس', 'أعطني تمرين تصريف (سنة خامسة ابتدائي)', 'لخص لي الثورة الفرنسية', 'أنشئ موضوع بكالوريا في الرياضيات'], en: ['Explain Thales\' theorem to me', 'Give me a conjugation exercise (5th primary)', 'Summarize the French Revolution', 'Generate a BEM Math exam topic'], fr: ['Explique-moi le théorème de Thalès', 'Donne-moi un exercice de conjugaison (5e primaire)', 'Résume la Révolution française', 'Génère un sujet de bac en mathématiques'] }; const chipsEl = document.getElementById('suggestion-chips'); if (chipsEl && suggestions[APP.lang]) chipsEl.innerHTML = suggestions[APP.lang].map(s => ``).join(''); else if (chipsEl && suggestions.en) chipsEl.innerHTML = suggestions.en.map(s => ``).join(''); } catch(e) { console.error('[render 2/2]', e); } try { try { if (typeof wireLayoutEvents === 'function') wireLayoutEvents(); else console.error('wireLayoutEvents not found'); } catch(e) { console.error('[wireLayoutEvents]', e); } try { if (typeof initAssistantPage === 'function') initAssistantPage(); else console.error('initAssistantPage not found'); } catch(e) { console.error('[initAssistantPage]', e); } const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const initialQuery = urlParams.get('q'); if (initialQuery) { const ta = document.getElementById('chat-textarea'); if (ta) { ta.value = initialQuery; document.getElementById('chat-form')?.requestSubmit(); } } document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(chip => { chip.addEventListener('click', () => { const ta = document.getElementById('chat-textarea'); if (ta) { ta.value = chip.dataset.prompt; document.getElementById('chat-form')?.requestSubmit(); } }); }); } catch(e) { console.error('[render 3/3]', e); } } function onLangChange() { render(); } window.onLangChange = onLangChange; init(); })(); } else if (page === 'admin') { (function() { async function init() { await loadData(); applyLocalDocOverrides(); applyLangToDocument(); render(); } function render() { document.title = t('admin.title') + ' — ' + t('siteName'); document.getElementById('header-root').innerHTML = renderHeader('admin'); document.getElementById('footer-root').innerHTML = renderFooter(); translateStaticDOM(); document.getElementById('theme-toggle').innerHTML = icon(APP.theme === 'light' ? 'moon' : 'sun'); document.getElementById('lock-icon').innerHTML = icon('lock'); document.getElementById('settings-icon').innerHTML = icon('settings'); document.getElementById('password-icon').innerHTML = icon('lock'); document.getElementById('doc-form-icon').innerHTML = icon('fileText'); document.getElementById('export-icon').innerHTML = icon('download'); document.getElementById('export-btn-icon').innerHTML = icon('download'); document.getElementById('import-icon').innerHTML = icon('upload'); wireLayoutEvents(); initAdminPage(); wireAdminTabs(); } function wireAdminTabs() { document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('tab-panel-docs').classList.toggle('hidden', btn.dataset.tab !== 'docs'); document.getElementById('tab-panel-keys').classList.toggle('hidden', btn.dataset.tab !== 'keys'); document.getElementById('tab-panel-password').classList.toggle('hidden', btn.dataset.tab !== 'password'); }); }); // Sub-tabs within Documents tab document.querySelectorAll('.admin-sub-tab').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { document.querySelectorAll('.admin-sub-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('#tab-panel-docs .admin-sub-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.add('hidden')); document.getElementById('sub-panel-' + btn.dataset.subtab).classList.remove('hidden'); }); }); } function onLangChange() { render(); } window.onLangChange = onLangChange; init(); })(); } } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var root = document.getElementById('app-root'); if (!root) { console.error('[School-Biblio] #app-root introuvable'); return; } var page = detectPage(); root.innerHTML = PAGE_MARKUP[page]; runPageScript(page); }); //
